datasets.name: response_times
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200)
SELECT
  model,
  COUNT(*) as request_count,
  ROUND(AVG(execution_duration_ms), 0) as avg_ms,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE(execution_duration_ms, 0.5), 0) as p50_ms,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE(execution_duration_ms, 0.95), 0) as p95_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(execution_duration_ms), 0) as min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(execution_duration_ms), 0) as max_ms
FROM all_payloads
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY avg_ms ASC

datasets.name: latency_percentiles
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200),
stats AS (
  SELECT model,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE(execution_duration_ms, 0.5), 0) as p50_ms,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE(execution_duration_ms, 0.95), 0) as p95_ms
  FROM all_payloads GROUP BY model
)
SELECT model, 'P50' as percentile, p50_ms as latency_ms FROM stats
UNION ALL
SELECT model, 'P95' as percentile, p95_ms as latency_ms FROM stats
ORDER BY model, percentile

datasets.name: token_usage
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200)
SELECT
  model,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(get_json_object(response, '$.usage.prompt_tokens') AS INT)), 0) as avg_prompt_tokens,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(get_json_object(response, '$.usage.completion_tokens') AS INT)), 0) as avg_completion_tokens,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(get_json_object(response, '$.usage.total_tokens') AS INT)), 0) as avg_total_tokens
FROM all_payloads
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY avg_total_tokens ASC

datasets.name: token_usage_unpivot
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200),
stats AS (
  SELECT model,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(get_json_object(response, '$.usage.prompt_tokens') AS INT)), 0) as prompt_tokens,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(get_json_object(response, '$.usage.completion_tokens') AS INT)), 0) as completion_tokens
  FROM all_payloads GROUP BY model
)
SELECT model, 'Prompt' as token_type, prompt_tokens as avg_tokens FROM stats
UNION ALL
SELECT model, 'Completion' as token_type, completion_tokens as avg_tokens FROM stats

datasets.name: quality_ranking
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200),
commentary_extracted AS (
  SELECT model, databricks_request_id,
    get_json_object(request, '$.messages[1].content') as user_prompt,
    CASE
      WHEN get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content') IS NOT NULL
           AND LEFT(TRIM(get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content')), 1) != '['
      THEN get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content')
      ELSE NULL
    END as commentary
  FROM all_payloads
),
scored AS (
  SELECT model, commentary,
    ai_query('databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet',
      CONCAT('Rate this darts commentary on a scale of 1-10 for enthusiasm, wit, and relevance to the score. Return ONLY a single integer between 1 and 10, nothing else. The dart score prompt was: "', user_prompt, '". The commentary was: "', commentary, '"')
    ) as raw_score
  FROM commentary_extracted
  WHERE commentary IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(commentary)) > 5
)
SELECT model,
  COUNT(*) as rated_responses,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(raw_score, '([0-9]+)', 1) AS INT)), 1) as avg_quality_score,
  MIN(CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(raw_score, '([0-9]+)', 1) AS INT)) as min_score,
  MAX(CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(raw_score, '([0-9]+)', 1) AS INT)) as max_score
FROM scored
WHERE REGEXP_EXTRACT(raw_score, '([0-9]+)', 1) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY avg_quality_score DESC

datasets.name: quality_scores
queryLines:
WITH all_payloads AS (SELECT 'Gemini 2.5 Flash' as model, databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gemini-2-5-flash_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Llama 4 Maverick', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-llama-4-maverick_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GPT OSS 120B', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-gpt-oss-120b_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Claude 3.7 Sonnet', databricks_request_id, request_time, status_code, execution_duration_ms, request, response
FROM classic_stable_5aj75r_catalog.intelligent_darts_app.`intelligent_darts_databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet_payload`
WHERE status_code = 200),
commentary_extracted AS (
  SELECT model, databricks_request_id, execution_duration_ms,
    get_json_object(request, '$.messages[1].content') as user_prompt,
    CASE
      WHEN get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content') IS NOT NULL
           AND LEFT(TRIM(get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content')), 1) != '['
      THEN get_json_object(response, '$.choices[0].message.content')
      ELSE 'No commentary generated'
    END as commentary
  FROM all_payloads
)
SELECT model, databricks_request_id, user_prompt, commentary, execution_duration_ms,
  ai_query('databricks-claude-3-7-sonnet',
    CONCAT('Rate this darts commentary on a scale of 1-10 for enthusiasm, wit, and relevance. Return ONLY a JSON object with keys: score (integer 1-10), reason (one sentence). The dart score was: "', user_prompt, '". The commentary was: "', commentary, '"')
  ) as quality_assessment
FROM commentary_extracted
WHERE commentary != 'No commentary generated' AND LENGTH(TRIM(commentary)) > 5
